authority: ARCHITECT-MEMO.md (deltas) + DESIGN.md (architecture) + premortems/ (verbatim findings); latency-plan units 3.2/3.3 SUPERSEDED

integration_protocol: ordered merge -> one regen_all --write per wave -> ruff/format/mypy -> per-unit batteries -> push -> CI matrix green -> enforcement rows -> telemetry deltas

units.title: append seam: fsync_required split + torn-line self-heal + request_id replay dedup substrate
design_constraints: DESIGN.md sec5 + memo delta3 (torn-line self-heal inside the lock; critical-section flag; lock-wait exempt from WEDGED clock)

16-consumer classification TABLE is a deliverable (swarm finding 4); source-of-truth ledgers get fsync_required=True, best-effort markers keep suppression
first-append parent-dir fsync
BLOCKED-ON: delta-RULING-1 (shared-seam byte-identity amendment) — build behind acceptance of that ruling
acceptance_tests: kill pre-fsync -> no record + clean retry; kill post-fsync/pre-reply -> record present, retry replay no-op
planted torn tail -> subsequent daemon+inline records both parse, torn record reported

units.title: daemon package core: transport/discovery/identity/lifecycle + serial Lane A wrapping McpServer.handle()

instance flock = first statement pre-import; per-fingerprint spawn lock; discovery liveness = pid+started_at; activation negative-cache breaker; suspend-aware watchdog deltas; first-instance pipe semantics; ONE casefolded getpass.getuser() seam hashed 12-hex (delta11)
editable/dirty installs daemon-INELIGIBLE v1 (delta9)
Lane A enters below main() at _dispatch_main/_invoke_parsed altitude; faulthandler once at boot; admission refuses hpc_env containing HPC_DETACHED_* (delta14)
drop queued-not-started RPCs on dead pipe at dequeue (delta2a)
route-through inspect.getsource pin (delta13)
daemon package never imports elicitation machinery + import pin (delta13)
acceptance_tests: envelope purity with planted chatty background thread + disconnecting client

units.title: thin client: discover -> liveness -> bounded connect -> hello -> call -> inline fallback

bounded connect engineered so wedged daemon costs <= client deadline, never 20s (delta10)
strips HPC_DETACHED_* (delta14)
always materializes --experiment-dir (delta15)

units.title: daemon-serve (Tier-3) + daemon-status/daemon-stop primitives + wire models + docs

Lane B via run_capture_bounded, semaphore 4
